title: Export to CSV button does nothing on Reports page
description: When I click 'Export to CSV' on the Reports dashboard, the button spins for a second and then nothing happens. No file downloads. Happens every time on Chrome and Firefox. This worked fine last week.

title: Feature request: allow custom date ranges in Reports
description: Right now Reports only supports Last 7 days / Last 30 days / Last quarter. It would be great to pick a custom start and end date so we can align reports with our internal billing cycle.

title: How do I invite teammates to my workspace?
description: We just signed up for the Team plan. I can't find where to add my colleagues as members. Is there a settings page for this?

title: App crashes when uploading files larger than 50MB
description: Uploading any file over ~50MB causes the whole app tab to freeze and eventually crash with a white screen. Tried on two different machines, same result. This is blocking us from migrating our data.

title: Export button not working (duplicate?)
description: Clicking export on the reports screen does not download anything. Using Chrome on Windows 11.

title: API rate limit is too low for our integration
description: We're hitting the 100 requests/minute rate limit constantly when syncing data through the public API. Can this be increased for Enterprise customers, or is there a batching endpoint we should use instead?
